title: Refreshed Styles
description: Built of the Remarkably Optimized Modpack for Performance. this pack aims to give a Massive visual uplift to the game, while still remaining vanilla Friendly
body:
![Full Pack Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d1aab034b47548fba7bb8d5665be4601eb4d18e3.png)

# Introducing Refreshed Styles!
Built off the [Remarkably Optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/remarkably) modpack for ultimate performance, using [Whimscape](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/whimscape) as the base texture, this pack aims to give a massive visual uplift to the game without adding a single new mechanic/feature. With the integration of several resourcepacks & shaders, this is the modpack you need to spice up your game.

# Why Refreshed Styles!
Refreshed Styles offers a full make over of the game while still keeping it vanilla friendly, without adding a single new Mechanic or Item. if you have a low end device & are unable to run the default [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) shader, Refreshed Styles comes with 2 other Light weigh yet good looking shaders you can run([Mellow Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/mellow) & [Simple Saturation Shaders](https://modrinth.com/shader/simple-saturation-shader)), if you don't want to run any shaders, that's ok, the game still looks amazing without them.
